differentials.name: Hyoglossal membrane anchors inferior posterior edge of tongue to hyoid bone
differentials.raw: Hyoglossal membrane anchors inferior posterior edge of tongue to hyoid bone

differentials.name: Midline lingual septum inserts into hyoglossal membrane + extends superiorly along midline of tongue dividing tongue into halves + providing attachments for transverse intrinsic muscles
differentials.raw: Midline lingual septum inserts into hyoglossal membrane + extends superiorly along midline of tongue dividing tongue into halves + providing attachments for transverse intrinsic muscles

differentials.name: Genioglossus-geniohyoid complex = both genioglossus m. + geniohyoid m.
differentials.raw: Genioglossus-geniohyoid complex = both genioglossus m. + geniohyoid m.

context: =  complex of muscle groups + fibrous scaffolding Function:   wide range of motion for mobile tongue ›  vertical + transverse ›  inferior + superior longitudinal Function:   raising + lowering of tongue, forward + backward motion Origin:   symphysis menti on back of mandible Insertion:   dorsum of tongue (interdigitating with intrinsic tongue muscles); hyoid bone (few inferolateral fibers) Origin:   symphysis menti on back of mandible Insertion:   hyoid bone Origin:   hyoid bone Insertion:   lateral aspect of tongue Anatomic subdivision: (A)  Mobile tongue (part of oral cavity) =  frenulum to
